Message:
In 2023, OWASP recommended to use 600,000 iterations for PBKDF2-HMAC-SHA256, 210,000 for PBKDF2-HMAC-SHA512, 1,300,000 for PBKDF2-HMAC-SHA1.
We Found: 4096

The US National Institute of Standards and Technology recommends a salt length of at least 128 bits.
>>/analysis/repo/internal/security/id.go
Unique (prefix uint64, salt string) string
	49:	enc := pbkdf2.Key(buffer[:], []byte(salt), 4096, 16, sha1.New)
	49:	enc := pbkdf2.Key(buffer[:], []byte(salt), 4096, 16, sha1.New)
	44:	func (id ID) Unique(prefix uint64, salt string) string {
We Found: 7

Salt should be random
